LCD Display
===========

The LCD display shows the current working status of the |PRODUCT_NAME|.

Displayed information typically includes:

- Battery level
- Input power
- Output power
- Charging status
- Error indicators
- UPS mode indicator

.. note::

   The detailed LCD icon explanations are presented with a numbered diagram
   in the official manual.
